summary: Verified navbar logo image replacement. All 8 requested checks PASS on the preview URL.

issues: BOOK NOW pill button is visible alongside the hamburger menu icon on mobile — it takes significant space next to the logo. Requirements only said 'preserve Book Now button', so this may be intentional, but typical pattern is to hide the desktop CTA on mobile since it also lives inside the mobile menu drawer. Flagging as informational only.

critical_code_review_comments: Optional UX: consider hiding nav-book-btn on mobile (hidden md:inline-flex) to reduce navbar clutter next to the new logo image on 390px viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logo verified: img src=/brand/new-look-logo.png, HTTP 200 image/png, desktop height 64px (target 55-65), mobile height 48px (target 45-50), nav-brand text is empty (old 'New Look Beauty' text removed), click on nav-brand while scrolled scrolls back to top (2000 -> 0). nav-book-btn, theme-toggle, nav-menu-btn, and all nav-link-* elements are present and visible on their respective viewports.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature update working as intended.
